records.why: Reviewed resolution records are frozen as a reviewed reference and the final-resolution boundary explicitly requires a later decision before closure.
This decision only selects final-resolution closure; it does not itself emit final resolution records.
C5 remains blocked until final weak-feedback resolution closure exists and a later C5 decision explicitly selects reconsideration.
This is still the reviewed-artifact/final-resolution closure path, not a live feedback audit path.
